title: Cherry-pick PR #712: Fix castling via text Move Input
description:
## Summary

Fixes #316.

- The `cleanSan()` function in `parseKeyboardMove()` had a `length > 2` guard that blocked 2-character inputs like `OO` and `00` from being recognized as kingside castling
- Literal string matching (`"o-o"`, `"o-o-o"`) only caught exact lowercase hyphenated forms, missing `O-O`, `0-0`, `OO`, `00`, etc.
- Replaced with regex-based normalization that accepts any combination of `O`/`o`/`0` with optional hyphens for both kingside and queenside castling

## Test plan

- [ ] E

in_scope: Port upstream PR #712 changes to our fork
Resolve any merge conflicts with our modifications
Verify the fix works in our build
out_of_scope: Unrelated changes to the same files

requirements: The bug/feature from PR #712 works correctly

acceptance_gates: PR #712 behavior verified in running app

manual: Verify PR #712 fix in running app

iteration_log.result: cleanSan already uses the new regex-based castling normalization
